provenance.note: Only plan-time rules are ported here. Artifact-time rules (review_mode: artifact) fire against a completed run bundle and are out of scope for offline plan validation.

priority.when: any finding action == 'block' OR any severity == 'critical'

rollup.ok_definition: ok = no finding with severity in {error, critical} and no finding with action == 'block' (warnings still allow ok=True).

metric_rules.suggested_fix: Add at least one tool step to the plan.

metric_rules.description: TR is below the sane fMRI acquisition range
metric_rules.message: TR < 0.3s is extremely fast for fMRI; verify this is not a unit error (ms vs s).
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Typical fMRI TR range is 0.5-3.0 s. Check whether value should be in seconds.

metric_rules.description: TR is above the sane fMRI acquisition range
metric_rules.message: TR > 5.0s is unusually long for fMRI; verify this is intentional.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Typical fMRI TR range is 0.5-3.0 s.

metric_rules.description: Smoothing kernel is too large for fMRI
metric_rules.message: FWHM smoothing kernel > 12mm is unusually large for fMRI.
FWHM smoothing kernel < 2mm is likely a unit error (voxels instead of mm).
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Specify FWHM in mm. Common values: 4, 6, 8 mm.

metric_rules.description: Too few events per condition for reliable beta estimation
metric_rules.message: Fewer than 8 events per condition; beta estimates may be unstable.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Standard event-related designs need >= 10 events/condition. For LSS use >= 5.

metric_rules.description: High-pass filter cutoff may remove neural signal
metric_rules.message: High-pass filter > 0.02 Hz (period < 50s) may remove slow neural signal.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Standard fMRI high-pass is 0.01 Hz (100s). For block designs use period > 2x block cycle.

kg_lookup.offline_note: This kg_lookup is IGNORED in offline mode (use_kg=False). Only the KG-backed pipeline_plan_review consults GLMDesignPrior.

metric_rules.description: Group-level analysis with very few subjects
metric_rules.message: Group analysis with fewer than 10 subjects is underpowered.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Standard fMRI group studies need N >= 20 for adequate power (80%) at typical effect sizes.

metric_rules.description: DWI b-value too low for standard tractography
metric_rules.message: b-value < 700 s/mm^2 is too low for standard DTI/tractography.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Standard DTI uses b=1000 s/mm^2; HARDI/CSD typically uses b=2000-3000 s/mm^2.

metric_rules.description: DWI b-value unusually high without multi-shell justification
metric_rules.message: b-value > 5000 s/mm^2 is extreme; verify this is intentional (e.g. NODDI).
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Standard HARDI: b=2000-3000. NODDI/advanced models: b=5000+ is valid but must be explicit.

metric_rules.description: Too few diffusion gradient directions for robust estimation
metric_rules.message: Fewer than 12 gradient directions is insufficient for DTI; HARDI requires >= 30.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Use >= 32 directions for DTI, >= 60 for CSD/HARDI. Minimum 6 is only valid for DKI debugging.

metric_rules.description: Parametric group test with very small N - nonparametric preferred
metric_rules.message: Parametric test with N < 8 violates normality assumptions; use nonparametric alternative.
metric_rules.suggested_fix: Use FSL randomise (permutation), or scipy.stats.mannwhitneyu / wilcoxon for small N.

structural_rules.message: An atlas/parcellation step precedes registration; results will be in wrong space.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Move the registration step before any atlas/parcellation step.

structural_rules.message: A registration step precedes skull-stripping; registering with skull may degrade accuracy.

structural_rules.description: GLM step present without a prior confound regression step
structural_rules.message: GLM step found but no confound regression step precedes it.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Add a confound regression step before GLM to remove motion and physiological noise.

structural_rules.description: EEG/MEG modality combined with volumetric MNI atlas
structural_rules.message: EEG/MEG data combined with a volumetric MNI atlas - modality/space mismatch.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Use a surface-based or EEG-compatible atlas (e.g. fsaverage, MNI-template with source imaging).

structural_rules.description: DWI-specific tool applied to BOLD/fMRI modality
structural_rules.message: A DWI-specific tool is declared alongside a BOLD/fMRI modality - modality mismatch.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Verify the correct modality is declared; DWI and BOLD pipelines must not share tractography steps.

structural_rules.description: Multiple incompatible MNI template versions in the same plan
structural_rules.message: Both MNI152NLin2009cAsym and MNI152NLin6Asym appear in the same plan.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Pick one MNI version and apply it consistently. MNI2009c is standard for fMRIPrep outputs.

structural_rules.description: Design-method compatibility check (offline: curated seed only)
structural_rules.message: Statistical method does not match the study design.
structural_rules.suggested_fix: Choose a statistical method that matches the study design's independence/dependence structure.
structural_rules.offline_note: In offline mode the KG edge lookup is skipped; only configs/br-kg/method_compatibility_seed.yaml (shipped here as method_compatibility_seed.json) is consulted. A fired finding keeps the SEED rule_id but is forced to severity=error/action=block by the engine's rule-metadata merge.

tool_sets.comment: Verbatim from checks/tool_order.py and checks/space_compat.py. Membership test lowercases the plan step's tool then checks `tool.lower() in set`; set members are kept in their SOURCE casing to reproduce production behavior exactly (see rules.md 'Case-sensitivity quirk').

checklist_tool_sets.comment: Verbatim from verdict_builder._generate_checklist_from_spec. Used ONLY to build the informational checklist, not to gate findings. All matched lowercased.
